channel.title: The Shadow | Ghost of Radio
channel.description: Stream all Shadow episodes free. Classic mystery radio drama 1937-1954. Who knows what evil lurks?
channel.itunes:author: Ghost of Radio

item.title: The Story Of The Shadow (1985 Radio Documentary) — The Shadow | Ghost of Radio
item.description: Listen to The Story Of The Shadow (1985 Radio Documentary) — The Shadow (CBS/Mutual, 1985). Classic old time radio streaming free on Ghost of Radio.

Murder By The Dead | The Shadow | Ghost of Radio
item.description: When a supposedly dead man begins committing murders, Lamont Cranston and Margo Lane must unravel a sinister scheme of faked deaths and very real killings.

item.title: The Three Ghosts | The Shadow | Ghost of Radio
item.description: On a night when the veil between worlds grows thin, three spectral figures terrorize a household — but The Shadow suspects a very human hand behind the haunting.

item.title: Sabotage | The Shadow | Ghost of Radio
item.description: Industrial saboteurs threaten to cripple the nation

The Society of the Living Dead | The Shadow | Ghost of Radio
item.description: A secret society promises eternal life to its members, but the price of immortality is murder — and The Shadow must expose their deadly fraud.

item.title: The Club Of Doom | The Shadow | December 19, 1943 | Ghost of Radio
The Ghost Without A Face | The Shadow | March 10, 1946 | Ghost of Radio
The Beast of Darrow House | The Shadow | March 07, 1948 | Ghost of Radio
The Circle of Death | The Shadow | Ghost of Radio
item.description: Members of a secret society are being murdered one by one in a tightening circle of death, and only The Shadow can break the deadly pattern.

item.title: The Thing in the Cage | The Shadow | February 08, 1948 | Ghost of Radio
The House Of Horror | The Shadow | Ghost of Radio
item.description: A decrepit mansion on the edge of town has claimed the lives of all who enter. When Margo Lane goes missing inside, The Shadow must brave its horrors to save her.

item.title: Carnival of Death | The Shadow | November 10, 1940 | Ghost of Radio
Doom And The Limping Man | The Shadow | November 16, 1947 | Ghost of Radio

Preview of Terror | The Shadow | June 05, 1949 | Ghost of Radio
The Plot Murder | The Shadow | Ghost of Radio
item.description: A murder mystery playwright discovers that his latest plot has come to life — someone is committing the murders he wrote, exactly as scripted.

The Poison Death | The Shadow | Ghost of Radio
item.description: A brilliant chemist has created an undetectable poison, and someone is using it to eliminate enemies one by one. The Shadow must find the killer before the poison claims another victim.

item.title: Mind Over Murder | The Shadow | March 31, 1946 | Ghost of Radio
Death From the Deep | The Shadow | Ghost of Radio
item.description: Something monstrous lurks beneath the harbor waters, dragging ships and sailors to their doom. The Shadow dives into the depths to confront a terror from the deep.

item.title: The Tomb of Terror | The Shadow | June 19, 1938 | Ghost of Radio
Gun Island | The Shadow | October 23, 1938 | Ghost of Radio
The Shadow Of Suspicion | The Shadow | December 29, 1946 | Ghost of Radio
The White Legion | The Shadow | Ghost of Radio
item.description: A band of hooded figures calling themselves The White Legion terrorizes an entire community, and only The Shadow dares to stand against their reign of fear.

item.title: The Gibbering Thing | The Shadow | September 26, 1943 | Ghost of Radio

The Phantom Voice | The Shadow | Ghost of Radio
item.description: A ghostly voice drives its listeners to madness and murder. Is it supernatural, or has someone found a terrifying new weapon of psychological terror?

item.title: Dreams Of Death | The Shadow | April 28, 1946 | Ghost of Radio
The Ghost Walks Again | The Shadow | March 16, 1941 | Ghost of Radio

The Chill Of Death | The Shadow | January 04, 1948 | Ghost of Radio
The Silent Avenger | The Shadow | Ghost of Radio
item.description: A mute vigilante is dispensing brutal justice across the city, targeting criminals the law cannot touch. But The Shadow knows that vengeance and justice are not the same.

item.title: Death To The Shadow | The Shadow | March 12, 1944 | Ghost of Radio
The Bride of Death | The Shadow | Ghost of Radio
The Hypnotized Audience | The Shadow | Ghost of Radio

The Ghost of the Stair | The Shadow | December 29, 1940 | Ghost of Radio
The Voice Of Death | The Shadow | Ghost of Radio
item.description: A disembodied voice delivers death sentences over the radio, and its victims die precisely as predicted. The Shadow must silence this voice before it strikes again.

item.title: The Death Triangle | The Shadow | Ghost of Radio
item.description: Three points on a map mark three murders, forming a triangle of terror that points to a mastermind

item.description: A mysterious Eastern temple in the heart of the city holds dark secrets, and its haunting bells toll for those marked for death.
